_comment_discovery: Seed keywords for auto-discovery of MORE creators in this niche. The live discovery agent is AutoSearch (../AutoSearch), reached through the hub's Discover stage; it reads ONLY discovery.keywords from here — every other knob (caps, min_followers, guest_only, the discovery_enabled kill-switch, optional Gemini term-expansion) lives on the auto-search agent config (GET/PUT /api/config/agent/auto-search, editable from the Dashboard). Instagram gates search behind login, so a burner sessionid (IG_SESSIONID or AutoSearch/session.txt) with guest_only=false is what actually enables search; guest-only discovery is shallow/empty by design. Just tell Claude what niche to target and it will rewrite these keywords.
_comment_virality: How 'viral' is scored. Each reel gets 4 signals, each normalized to a 0-1 percentile across the whole dataset, then blended by these weights into a 0-100 virality_score. Adjust weights to bias what 'viral' means for you (weights are auto-normalized to sum to 1).
